title: hesperis matronalis var. sylvestris
intro: Hesperis matronalis var. sylvestris, also known as the woodland or wood betony, is a perennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties that help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. The woodland betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and it has been used in herbal medicine for centuries to treat a variety of ailments.
